examples.title: Algorithm: Boundary Following
examples.description: This pseudocode demonstrates the boundary following technique used in morphological image processing.
examples.code:
ALGORITHM BoundaryFollowing
INPUT: binary image
OUTPUT: chain code

BEGIN
 DEFINE directions as (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1), (-1, 0)
 INITIALIZE chain code as empty sequence
 FOR EACH pixel in the image
 IF pixel is a boundary point
 ADD chain code number to the sequence
 RETURN chain code
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode defines the boundary following technique used to extract the boundaries of an object in an image. It iterates over each pixel in the image, checks if the pixel is a boundary point, and adds the corresponding chain code number to the sequence.
